title: US Quality Core
descmd: This version establishes the US Quality Core Implementation Guide
introduction: Defines quality-focused profiles derived from US Core to support standardized representation and exchange of data for quality improvement applications including digital quality measurement and reporting programs. In the same way US Core provides a FHIR rendering of USCDI, US Quality Core provides a FHIR rendering of USCDI+Quality. The IG provides profiles, guidelines and capability statements that define specific expectations for actors exchanging US Quality Core data over standard RESTful FHIR interfaces and defines additional profiles and extensions to cover quality-related data not fully addressed in US Core and incorporates certification-oriented requirements.
